tasks.title: Implement API authentication with API keys
evidence: internal/api/server.go has no authentication middleware
API is completely open when exposed beyond localhost
No API key or token validation in any handler
plan: Create internal/api/middleware.go with API key auth middleware
Add API key storage to auth vault
Implement X-API-Key header validation
Add API key generation and rotation commands to CLI
Support read-only vs read-write key permissions
Make auth optional when bound to localhost (dev mode)
Update OpenAPI spec with security schemes
Write tests for auth middleware

tasks.title: Add screenshot capture capability
evidence: No screenshot functionality in any fetcher
No ScreenshotOptions or CaptureScreenshot field in types
Competitors offer screenshot capture for visual verification
plan: Add ScreenshotConfig struct with FullPage, Viewport, Format, Quality fields
Implement screenshot capture in ChromedpFetcher using chromedp.Screenshot
Implement screenshot capture in PlaywrightFetcher using page.Screenshot
Store screenshots alongside job results
Add screenshot option to RenderProfile
Update OpenAPI spec with screenshot options
Add screenshot preview to web UI results
Write tests for screenshot capture

tasks.title: Implement Parquet export format for analytics pipelines
evidence: Exporter only supports json, jsonl, md, csv - no columnar formats
Parquet is standard for BigQuery, Athena, Spark analytics pipelines
No Apache Parquet support found in codebase
plan: Add github.com/xitongsys/parquet-go dependency
Create internal/exporter/parquet.go with Parquet exporter
Implement schema inference from extraction fields
Support compression (SNAPPY, GZIP)
Add 'parquet' case to exporter switch
Update OpenAPI spec format enum
Add Parquet download option to web UI
Write tests for Parquet export

tasks.title: Add mobile device emulation for responsive content
evidence: internal/fetch/types.go only has UserAgent configuration
No Device, Viewport, or Mobile fields in RenderProfile
Cannot scrape mobile-responsive content that differs from desktop
plan: Add DeviceEmulation struct with Name, Viewport, UserAgent, Touch fields
Add preset devices (iPhone, iPad, Pixel, etc.)
Implement device emulation in ChromedpFetcher using chromedp.Emulate
Implement device emulation in Playwright using context.SetViewportSize
Add --device flag to CLI with preset options
Update OpenAPI spec with device emulation options
Add device selector to web UI
Write tests for device emulation

tasks.title: Implement per-host rate limiting
evidence: internal/fetch/limiter.go uses global QPS/burst for all hosts
Single RATE_LIMIT_QPS env var - no per-host configuration
Some sites need gentler crawling than others
plan: Add RateLimitQPS and RateLimitBurst fields to RenderProfile
Create per-host rate limiter registry in limiter.go
Use host-specific limiter when profile has custom rates
Fall back to global limiter for hosts without custom config
Support wildcards in host patterns (*.example.com)
Update render profile JSON schema
Add rate limit display to web UI
Write tests for per-host rate limiting

tasks.title: Add request/response interception for API scraping
evidence: No network interception capabilities in fetchers
Cannot capture XHR/Fetch API calls made by SPAs
No HAR (HTTP Archive) format export available
plan: Add NetworkInterceptConfig with URL patterns and resource types
Implement network event listeners in ChromedpFetcher
Implement route interception in PlaywrightFetcher
Capture request/response pairs for matched patterns
Store intercepted data alongside page content
Add HAR format export option
Update OpenAPI spec with interception options
Write tests for network interception

tasks.title: Implement POST/PUT/DELETE HTTP methods and request body support
evidence: internal/fetch/http_fetcher.go only implements GET requests
No Method or Body fields in Request type
Cannot scrape APIs that require POST with JSON payload
plan: Add Method and Body fields to Request type
Add ContentType and Headers for request configuration
Implement POST/PUT/DELETE in HTTPFetcher
Implement form submission in ChromedpFetcher
Support JSON and form-encoded request bodies
Add --method and --body flags to CLI
Update OpenAPI spec with method and body options
Write tests for non-GET methods

tasks.title: Add database export targets (PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB)
evidence: All exporters write to local files only
No database connection or export capability
Users must manually import files into databases
plan: Create internal/exporter/database.go with database exporters
Implement PostgreSQL exporter with bulk insert
Implement MySQL exporter with prepared statements
Implement MongoDB exporter with document batches
Add connection string configuration
Support table/collection creation with schema inference
Add upsert vs insert mode options
Update OpenAPI spec with database export options
Write tests with testcontainers

tasks.title: Implement cloud storage export (S3, GCS, Azure Blob)
evidence: Exporters only write to local filesystem
No cloud storage integration found
Users in cloud environments need direct bucket export
plan: Create internal/exporter/cloud.go with cloud exporters
Implement S3 exporter using AWS SDK
Implement GCS exporter using Google Cloud SDK
Implement Azure Blob exporter
Support multipart uploads for large files
Add IAM role and credential chain support
Support path templates with date/job variables
Update OpenAPI spec with cloud export options
Write tests with localstack/azurite

tasks.title: Add batch job submission API
evidence: API only supports single job creation per request
No batch endpoint for submitting multiple URLs
Inefficient for users who need to scrape many URLs at once
plan: Add POST /jobs/batch endpoint
Create BatchJobRequest with []JobSpec
Implement parallel job creation in manager
Return batch ID and individual job IDs
Add batch status endpoint GET /jobs/batch/{id}
Support batch cancellation
Update OpenAPI spec with batch endpoints
Add batch submission UI to web
Write tests for batch operations

tasks.title: Implement job dependencies and chaining
evidence: Job model has no dependency fields
Cannot create job workflows (crawl -> extract -> analyze)
Each job is independent - no orchestration capability
plan: Add DependsOn []string field to Job model
Add JobChain model for named workflows
Implement dependency resolution in manager
Auto-start jobs when dependencies complete
Handle failure propagation (fail dependent jobs)
Add chain visualization to web UI
Update OpenAPI spec with dependency fields
Write tests for dependency resolution

tasks.title: Add PDF export format
evidence: No PDF generation capability in exporters
Cannot export scraped pages as PDF documents
Useful for reports and archival
plan: Add PDF export using headless browser (Chromedp/Playwright)
Support page ranges for crawl results
Add header/footer templates
Support table of contents generation
Add 'pdf' case to exporter switch
Update OpenAPI spec format enum
Add PDF download to web UI
Write tests for PDF export

tasks.title: Implement cookie persistence and session management
evidence: HTTP fetcher uses in-memory cookie jar per request
No persistent cookie sessions across jobs
Must re-login for every scrape of authenticated sites
plan: Add SessionStore to auth vault for cookie persistence
Add SessionID field to Request and RenderProfile
Implement cookie jar serialization to JSON
Auto-save session after successful login
Add session list/get/delete CLI commands
Support session refresh with refresh tokens
Update OpenAPI spec with session options
Write tests for session persistence

tasks.title: Add adaptive rate limiting based on server response
evidence: Rate limiter uses fixed QPS - no adaptation
Retry-After header is read but not used for throttling
No backoff based on 429 responses or server load
plan: Add adaptive rate limiting mode to limiter
Monitor 429 responses and adjust QPS downward
Respect Retry-After header for cooldown
Gradually increase rate on successful requests
Add per-host adaptive state tracking
Add ADAPTIVE_RATE_LIMIT env var config
Log rate adjustments for visibility
Write tests for adaptive behavior

tasks.title: Implement optional robots.txt compliance
evidence: AGENTS.md explicitly states 'Robots.txt: Ignored by design'
No robots.txt parsing or checking in codebase
Some users need polite crawling for compliance
plan: Create internal/crawl/robots.go with robots.txt parser
Implement user-agent matching and rule evaluation
Add CrawlDelay support for rate limiting
Add --respect-robots flag (default: false)
Add RESPECT_ROBOTS env var
Cache robots.txt per host to avoid repeated fetches
Log when URLs are skipped due to robots.txt
Write tests for robots.txt parsing
